tasks.title: Update Worker SnapBucket Array
tasks.instruction: The worker currently snaps image widths to [400, 800, 1200]. Add 200 to this active parameter array so that tiny UI thumbnail grids don't unnecessarily load 400px files.

tasks.title: Hook up Image.astro to the Cloudflare Edge
tasks.instruction: Implement native responsive design using the `srcset` attribute. Consume the `IMAGE_GATEWAY_URL` environment variable. Automatically generate the `srcset` string requesting the `400w`, `800w`, and `1200w` variants from the Gateway. Ensure the default `src` fallback uses the 800px variant.

tasks.title: Cloudflare Email Obfuscation + View Transitions
tasks.instruction: Astro's ClientRouter blocks Cloudflare's edge-injected email-decode.min.js from re-executing upon client-side navigation. Read the research file at CONTEXT FILES.AGENTS/CLOUDFLARE EMAIL OBFUSCATION.md and implement the exact astro:page-load script detailed at the bottom of the document to solve this issue.
